description: A radiant cosmic dust that guarantees +10 levels to any Pokémon. No fail chance! Requires Prestige 1+.
guide:
✨ *ITEM GUIDE: ENCHANTED STARDUST* ✨
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📖 *Description:*
A radiant cosmic dust harvested from fallen stars. Guarantees a powerful level boost to any Pokémon.

ℹ️ *How it works:*
• *Guaranteed Boost:* Adds a random amount of levels between (current level + 10) and the Pokémon's max level cap.
• *No Fail Chance:* Unlike Level Orbs, Enchanted Stardust NEVER fails!
• *Restriction:* Cannot be used if the Pokémon is within 10 levels of its max cap.

⚠️ *Requirement:* Prestige Level 1 or above to purchase.

🛒 *Price:* 10,000 PokéCoins

description: A mischievous wand that can block another trainer from catching for 5 spawns! 50% backfire chance. Requires Prestige 1+.
guide:
🪄 *ITEM GUIDE: ENCHANTED WAND* 🪄
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📖 *Description:*
A mischievous enchanted wand that can hex another trainer!

ℹ️ *How it works:*
• *Target a Player:* Use this item on another trainer.
• *50% Success:* If successful, the target cannot catch Pokémon for the next 5 global spawns.
• *50% Backfire:* If it fails, YOU get the catch block instead!

⚠️ *Requirement:* Prestige Level 1 or above to purchase.

🛒 *Price:* 20,000 PokéCoins

description: A powerful self-buff! Activate to catch any Pokémon by typing just 'kitsune catch' — no name needed! Lasts 20 catches. Stackable! Once per day purchase. Requires Prestige 1+.
guide:
💩 *ITEM GUIDE: DIRTY DIAPER* 💩
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📖 *Description:*
A legendary foul-smelling diaper that grants the wearer the power to skip spelling hard Pokémon names!

ℹ️ *How it works:*
• *Self-Buff:* Use this on YOURSELF with `-pokeuse dirty diaper`.
• *Effect:* For the next 20 successful catches, you can type just `kitsune catch` to catch any Pokémon — no need to spell the name!
• *Stackable:* Uses stack! If you have 20 charges left and use another diaper, you'll have 40!
• *Purchase Limit:* Can only be bought once per day from the Omega Shop — but you can save them up and use whenever you want!

⚠️ *Requirement:* Prestige Level 1 or above to purchase.

🛒 *Price:* 10,000 PokéCoins

description: Removes your catch cooldown for 30 minutes — no skip penalties! Requires Prestige 1+.
guide:
💅 *ITEM GUIDE: LITERALLY KAREN* 💅
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📖 *Description:*
Channel your inner Karen and demand to catch every single Pokémon with no cooldown!

ℹ️ *How it works:*
• *No Cooldown:* For 30 minutes, you will NOT have any catch cooldown (no "skip 1 spawn" penalty).
• *Catch Everything:* Every spawn that appears, you can catch immediately!

⚠️ *Requirement:* Prestige Level 1 or above to purchase.

🛒 *Price:* 50,000 PokéCoins
